entry.title: Maaveeran X Veerame Jeyam | Sivakarthikeyan | Kollywood | Movie Posters
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

A bold minimalist artwork inspired by Sivakarthikeyan’s Maaveeran, designed with intense red-black contrast and powerful heroic symbolism.

Featuring a towering retro-action silhouette, dramatic shadow composition, and iconic Tamil typography, this artwork creates a strong cinematic statement for modern wall setups and gaming rooms.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • Minimal Tamil cinematic artwork style
  • High-contrast red & black visual aesthetic
  • Inspired by the movie Maaveeran
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Sivakarthikeyan & Tamil movie fans
  • Gaming & entertainment room decor
  • Minimal bold wall aesthetics
  • Modern studio & bachelor room setups

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Hi Nanna | A Love Remembered | Emotional Aesthetic | Movie Posters
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Celebrate one of the most heartfelt cinematic moments with this Hi Nanna – A Love Remembered aesthetic wall poster. Designed with soft painterly textures, dreamy tones, and gentle light, this artwork captures the warmth, innocence, and deep emotional connection that defines the film.

Whether you're a fan of Nani, Mrunal Thakur, or simply love soulful romance stories, this poster brings a calming, nostalgic feel to any space. Perfect for bedrooms, study rooms, and creative workspaces, it serves as a reminder of love that heals, memories that stay, and bonds that are never forgotten.

Printed on premium-quality matte art paper, this poster delivers rich colors, subtle details, and a cinematic finish—making it a beautiful addition to your aesthetic room décor.

entry.title: VADACHENNAI x Grand Vada Chennai | Kollywood | Movie Posters
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 79.00 - 169.00 (4 variants)

Premium high-definition wall poster of VADACHENNAI | Kollywood | Movie Posters, designed to instantly upgrade the aesthetic of your room.

Printed on ultra-thick 300 GSM matte photo paper for rich colours, sharp detailing and a soft anti-glare finish. Long-lasting, fade-resistant and crafted to give your wall a clean, premium look with zero effort.

This poster blends perfectly into bedroom, living room, gaming setup or workspace décor. Easy to frame, perfect for collage walls, and ideal for anyone who loves aesthetic room vibes, minimal design and high-quality prints.

A great pick for personal use or gifting — made to match your vibe and elevate your space.
